name: golang-github-op-go-logging-dev
title: golang-github-op-go-logging-dev
description:
Golang logging library
Package logging implements a logging infrastructure for Go.
Its output format is customizable and supports different logging
backends like syslog, file and memory.  Multiple backends can be
utilized with different log levels per backend and logger.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-op-go-logging-dev because Golang logging library.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-op-go-logging-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-op-go-logging-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-op-go-logging-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
